homepage.heroSubline: Reliable electrical solutions for commercial and industrial clients across metro Atlanta. We deliver quality workmanship and lasting results, guaranteed.
aboutText: Cariboo Industrial Electric was founded over a decade ago by seasoned electricians who saw a need for specialized expertise in the Atlanta commercial sector. We're not a jack-of-all-trades; we focus on delivering top-tier industrial and commercial electrical services, handling the complexities others can't.

Our approach is simple: understand the unique needs of each client, develop a robust plan, and execute with precision. We prioritize safety above all else, adhering to the highest industry standards and local codes. From initial consultation to project completion, we maintain open communication and transparency.

We're deeply invested in the Atlanta community. We actively support local vocational programs, mentoring aspiring electricians and contributing to a skilled workforce. We believe in building strong relationships with our clients and partners, fostering growth and prosperity for the region.

valueProps.title: Expert Technicians
valueProps.description: Our team comprises licensed and experienced electricians, well-versed in commercial and industrial electrical systems.

valueProps.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
valueProps.description: Electrical problems don't wait for business hours. We offer round-the-clock emergency support to minimize downtime.

valueProps.title: Safety First
valueProps.description: We adhere to strict safety protocols and prioritize the well-being of our team and your property.

valueProps.title: Guaranteed Workmanship
valueProps.description: We stand behind our work with a solid guarantee, ensuring your complete satisfaction.

homepage.ctaSubline: Discuss your project with our experts and receive a detailed, no-obligation estimate.

services.name: Commercial Electrical Installations
services.shortDescription: Expert electrical installations for new commercial construction and renovations.
services.description: We specialize in comprehensive electrical installations for commercial properties throughout Atlanta. From initial design and planning to final wiring and testing, our team ensures your project is completed safely, efficiently, and to code. We handle everything from power distribution systems and lighting design to specialized equipment wiring and backup generator installations. Our experience in Atlanta's diverse commercial landscape, from the high-rises of Buckhead to the historic buildings of Inman Park, allows us to tailor our services to your specific needs. We understand the importance of minimizing disruptions to your business, so we work diligently to complete projects on time and within budget. We also take into account the unique challenges presented by Atlanta's climate, such as the need for robust surge protection to safeguard against frequent thunderstorms.

faq.question: What types of commercial properties do you service?
faq.answer: We serve a wide range of commercial properties, including office buildings, retail spaces, restaurants, warehouses, and industrial facilities.

faq.question: Do you handle electrical permits?
faq.answer: Yes, we manage all necessary electrical permits and inspections to ensure compliance with local regulations.

faq.question: What is the typical turnaround time for a commercial installation?
faq.answer: Turnaround time varies depending on the scope and complexity of the project. We provide a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.

services.name: Industrial Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: Reliable electrical solutions for industrial facilities, minimizing downtime and maximizing efficiency.
services.description: Cariboo Industrial Electric provides comprehensive electrical services for industrial facilities across the Atlanta metro area. We understand the critical importance of maintaining uninterrupted power supply in demanding industrial environments. Our team is equipped to handle complex electrical systems, including high-voltage equipment, motor controls, and automated machinery. We specialize in troubleshooting electrical faults, performing preventative maintenance, and upgrading outdated systems to enhance efficiency and safety. We're familiar with the electrical demands of Atlanta's diverse industrial sector, from food processing plants to manufacturing facilities. We also understand the impact of Atlanta's humid climate on electrical equipment, and we implement strategies to mitigate corrosion and ensure long-term reliability. Our goal is to minimize downtime, optimize energy consumption, and keep your operations running smoothly.

faq.question: What types of industrial equipment do you service?
faq.answer: We service a wide range of industrial equipment, including motors, generators, transformers, control panels, and automated machinery.

faq.question: Do you offer thermal imaging services?
faq.answer: Yes, we use thermal imaging to detect potential electrical hotspots and prevent equipment failures.

faq.question: Can you help us upgrade our lighting to LED?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We can design and install energy-efficient LED lighting systems to reduce your energy consumption and improve visibility.

services.name: Generator Installation & Repair
services.shortDescription: Ensure uninterrupted power with our expert generator services.
services.description: Atlanta's unpredictable weather, especially during spring thunderstorm season, can lead to frequent power outages. Cariboo Industrial Electric offers comprehensive generator services to keep your business running smoothly, no matter the weather. We specialize in the installation, maintenance, and repair of commercial and industrial generators. Our team can help you select the right generator size and type for your specific needs, ensuring reliable backup power during outages. We also provide regular maintenance services to keep your generator in peak condition, minimizing the risk of unexpected failures. And in the event of a breakdown, our 24/7 emergency repair service is available to get you back up and running quickly. We understand the importance of reliable backup power for businesses in Atlanta, and we're committed to providing top-quality generator services.

faq.question: What size generator do I need?
faq.answer: The size of the generator depends on your specific power requirements. We can perform a load calculation to determine the appropriate size for your business.

faq.question: How often should I have my generator serviced?
faq.answer: We recommend regular maintenance at least once a year to ensure optimal performance and reliability.

faq.question: Do you offer remote monitoring services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer remote monitoring services to track generator performance and detect potential issues before they become major problems.

services.name: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your electrical panel for improved safety and performance.
services.description: Is your electrical panel outdated or overloaded? Cariboo Industrial Electric specializes in electrical panel upgrades for commercial and industrial properties in Atlanta. An outdated panel can be a safety hazard, increasing the risk of electrical fires and equipment damage. Overloaded panels can cause breakers to trip frequently, disrupting your operations. Our team can assess your current electrical panel and recommend the appropriate upgrade to meet your power demands. We handle everything from panel replacement to circuit breaker upgrades, ensuring your electrical system is safe, reliable, and code-compliant. We understand the unique electrical needs of businesses in Atlanta, and we're committed to providing top-quality panel upgrade services.
process: Step 1: Panel Assessment and Load Calculation

faq.question: How do I know if I need an electrical panel upgrade?
faq.answer: Signs that you may need an upgrade include frequent breaker trips, flickering lights, and outdated equipment.

faq.question: How long does it take to upgrade an electrical panel?
faq.answer: The duration of the upgrade depends on the complexity of the project. We provide a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.

faq.question: Do I need to shut down my business during the upgrade?
faq.answer: We work to minimize disruptions to your business. In some cases, we can perform the upgrade after hours or on weekends.

services.name: Commercial Lighting Design & Installation
services.shortDescription: Enhance your business with our professional lighting solutions.
services.description: Effective lighting is essential for creating a safe, productive, and inviting environment for your business. Cariboo Industrial Electric offers comprehensive lighting design and installation services for commercial properties throughout Atlanta. We can help you choose the right lighting fixtures and layouts to maximize energy efficiency, improve visibility, and enhance the aesthetics of your space. Our team is experienced in installing a wide range of lighting systems, including LED lighting, recessed lighting, track lighting, and outdoor lighting. We understand the importance of lighting design in Atlanta's diverse commercial landscape, and we're committed to providing top-quality lighting solutions that meet your specific needs.

faq.question: What are the benefits of LED lighting?
faq.answer: LED lighting is more energy-efficient, longer-lasting, and more durable than traditional lighting options.

faq.question: Can you help me design a lighting system for my retail store?
faq.answer: Yes, we can design a custom lighting system to highlight your products and create an inviting shopping experience.

faq.question: Do you offer outdoor lighting services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a full range of outdoor lighting services, including security lighting, landscape lighting, and parking lot lighting.

services.name: Data Cabling & Networking
services.shortDescription: Reliable data cabling and networking solutions for seamless connectivity.
services.description: In today's digital age, a robust and reliable network infrastructure is essential for any business. Cariboo Industrial Electric provides comprehensive data cabling and networking services for commercial properties throughout Atlanta. We specialize in the installation, testing, and maintenance of data cabling systems, ensuring seamless connectivity for your computers, phones, and other devices. Our team is experienced in working with a variety of cabling types, including Cat5e, Cat6, and fiber optic cabling. We also offer network design and configuration services to optimize your network performance. We understand the importance of a reliable network for businesses in Atlanta, and we're committed to providing top-quality data cabling and networking solutions.

faq.question: What is the difference between Cat5e and Cat6 cabling?
faq.answer: Cat6 cabling offers higher performance and faster data transfer speeds than Cat5e cabling.

faq.question: Do you offer fiber optic cabling services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a full range of fiber optic cabling services, including installation, termination, and testing.

faq.question: Can you help me troubleshoot my network problems?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer network troubleshooting services to identify and resolve network issues.

services.name: Electrical Maintenance & Repair
services.shortDescription: Keep your electrical systems running smoothly with our expert maintenance and repair services.
services.description: Cariboo Industrial Electric provides comprehensive electrical maintenance and repair services for commercial and industrial properties across the Atlanta metro area. We understand that proactive maintenance is key to preventing costly breakdowns and ensuring the safety of your electrical systems. Our team offers a variety of maintenance services, including routine inspections, thermal imaging, and equipment testing. We also provide 24/7 emergency repair services to address unexpected electrical problems quickly and efficiently. Whether you need a minor repair or a major system overhaul, our team is equipped to handle any electrical challenge. We're familiar with the unique electrical needs of businesses in Atlanta, and we're committed to providing top-quality maintenance and repair services.

faq.question: How often should I have my electrical systems inspected?
faq.answer: We recommend routine inspections at least once a year to identify potential problems early.

faq.question: What is thermal imaging?
faq.answer: Thermal imaging uses infrared technology to detect heat signatures, which can indicate potential electrical problems.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer 24/7 emergency repair services to address unexpected electrical problems quickly and efficiently.

serviceAreas.content:
Cariboo Industrial Electric is proud to offer comprehensive electrical services to the residents and businesses of Marietta, Georgia.  Known for its charming downtown square and historical significance, Marietta boasts a diverse mix of residential and commercial properties.  Many of the homes in Marietta are located in established subdivisions dating back to the 1960s and 70s, which often require electrical upgrades to meet modern demands and safety standards. We are equipped to handle everything from knob and tube wiring replacement to panel upgrades and landscape lighting installations. 

As a trusted Atlanta-area electrical contractor, Cariboo Industrial Electric understands the unique electrical needs of Marietta residents. The hot, humid Georgia summers place a significant strain on electrical systems, requiring robust and reliable solutions. Whether you need assistance with air conditioning wiring, surge protection, or routine maintenance, our team of experienced electricians is dedicated to providing exceptional service and ensuring your electrical systems are safe and efficient.
serviceAreas.localContext: Marietta's blend of historic properties and modern businesses creates unique electrical challenges.  We provide tailored solutions to fit the specific needs of this vibrant city.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: Cariboo Industrial Electric did a fantastic job installing the electrical system for our new restaurant in Midtown. They were professional, efficient, and the quality of their work was outstanding. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Sarah K.
reviews.text: Our generator failed during a power outage, and Cariboo Industrial Electric came to the rescue. They arrived quickly, diagnosed the problem, and had the generator running again in no time. Their 24/7 emergency service is a lifesaver!

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: We recently upgraded our electrical panel with Cariboo Industrial Electric. The process was smooth and efficient. The team was professional and answered all of our questions. Very pleased with the results.

reviews.name: Jessica M.
reviews.text: Cariboo Industrial Electric transformed our office space with their expert lighting design and installation services. The new lighting is more energy-efficient, brighter, and creates a much more pleasant work environment.

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: Cariboo Industrial Electric did an excellent job running new data cables throughout our building. The team was professional, organized, and completed the project on time and within budget. Our network is now faster and more reliable.

reviews.name: Ashley G.
reviews.text: We hired Cariboo Industrial Electric for routine electrical maintenance, and they did a thorough job inspecting our systems. They identified a potential problem with a transformer and fixed it before it caused a major outage. Very professional!
